rules.name: Conquerors
rules.fullDesc: All Infantry models in this army gain Objective Secured.

rules.name: Flayer Virus
rules.fullDesc: All models in this army suffer Ld-2.

rules.name: Leaderless
rules.fullDesc: Each model only counts as half a model for the purposes of Contesting and Claiming Objective Markers.

rules.name: Infighting
rules.fullDesc: No unit can ever have more than one Character or Independent Character joined at any given time, or any Aura from more than one Necron Character or Independent Character affecting them at any given time.

rules.name: The Power of the Stars
rules.fullDesc: All weapons that are not Tesla have the Rending special rule. If a model already had Rending, it may trigger on a 4+ instead of a 5+. This does not affect Auto Wounds or any other Wound that does not have a Roll To Wound. Necron Vehicles explode on a 4+ from this Dynasty.

rules.name: Abundant Precious Metals
rules.fullDesc: Models in this army may reroll 1s on Armour Saves.

rules.name: Yearn for Pure Light Forms
rules.fullDesc: All models gain Fleet but cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers.

rules.name: Treasure Horde
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army have Objective Secured for Objective Markers within your Deployment Zone.

rules.name: Isolationists
rules.fullDesc: Your models cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers inside the Enemy Deployment Zone.

rules.name: Ferric's Blight
rules.fullDesc: All models from this Dynasty suffer Sv+1, resulting in 1 worse Armour Save. This does not affect Unique Characters.

rules.name: Blood Crazed
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army gain Shock Assault and Furious Charge. This does not affect Unique Characters.

rules.name: Dark Origins
rules.fullDesc: All models have I1, regardless of their Datasheet. Unique Characters are not affected by this.

rules.name: Blackstone Experts
rules.fullDesc: Each unit of Infantry may attempt to Deny the Witch once per Round.

rules.name: King's Chosen
rules.fullDesc: Every Infantry and Monstrous Infantry model has Bodyguard.

rules.name: Aggressive Territory Grab
rules.fullDesc: Models count as 2 models for the purposes of Contesting and Claiming Objective Markers that are not in an enemy Deployment Zone. Units eligible to declare charges must do so. They may still nominate to fire their weapons or advance, even if this invalidates the chance to Declare a Charge.

rules.name: Slavers
rules.fullDesc: Characters and Independent Characters must accept all Challenges issued. If more than one eligible model is available, you may nominate which one accepts the Challenge.

armyRules.name: Canoptek
armyRules.fullDesc: This model does not suffer the Autowounds from losing Combat Resolution as a Fearless model. If this model is part of a unit that does not have the Canoptek keyword, the unit still takes the Autowounds (ignoring this model if any bleed over).

armyRules.name: Hardwired for Destruction
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll 1's To Hit.

armyRules.name: Living Metal
armyRules.fullDesc: Models with Living Metal Heal 1 Wound up to their Starting Wounds on their profile during each of your Command Phases. A model cannot Heal more than once per Turn unless a special rule says otherwise.

armyRules.name: Quantum Shielding
armyRules.fullDesc: Units with Quantum Shield treat all Armour Facings as 13 instead of the Datasheet value until the first Penetration. Resolve all Hits from the unit that penetrates this Shield simultaneously. After this, the Datasheet FA, SA, and RA are used for the remainder of the game.

armyRules.name: Reanimation
armyRules.fullDesc: If a model with Reanimation is slain, do not remove the model from the table. At the end of each Phase, regardless of whose turn it is, roll a d6 for each model Slain. On a 5+, the model gets back up and resumes fighting. In the case of multi-Wound models, roll a d3 for each. The net total of the unit heals this many Wounds in restored models, but the d3 total each cannot exceed the maximum Starting Wounds of the model being Reanimated.

armyRules.name: Soulless Machine
armyRules.fullDesc: Models with this rule may not willingly Go To Ground. One of the few exceptions would be if a unit with this is forced to Go To Ground after being forced to Disembark of a multi-level Terrain Piece from a level above the ground, or from a wrecked Transport that does not use Teleporters.

armyRules.name: My Will Be Done
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

armyRules.name: Relentless March
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.

armyRules.name: Their Number is Legion
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll 1's To Reanimate.

armyRules.name: Empyric Overcharge
armyRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura, target Psyker suffers Perils of the Warp on all Doubles as if they were both 1's. This does not modify the To Cast value or prevent Casting in any way. This Aura is cast before the Cast Rolls happen. Natural Double 1s also apply Perils of the Warp like normal.

armyRules.name: Immune to Natural Law
armyRules.fullDesc: Ignores models and Terrain for moving. May not fire Overwatch with C'Tan Powers. This model ignores the extra Wound it suffers from Monsterbane.

armyRules.name: Eternity Portal
armyRules.fullDesc: Teleporter. This model has a Transport Capacity of 20, but instead of carrying the models it keeps them in Reserve. Any model with a Teleporter rule may bring up to its Transport capacity to the field each Turn. Access Front.

armyRules.name: War Construct
armyRules.fullDesc: This model does not count as a Monster for Poisoned weapons.

armyRules.name: Particle Focus
armyRules.fullDesc: Any number of Monoliths within range and firing arcs of their Particle Whips to this model may forgo their shooting with their Particle Whips. For each shot given up, this model's primary weapon may fire an additional time.

armyRules.name: Repair Barge
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to Reanimation Rolls. This can never surpass 4+ by any means.

armyRules.name: Broadside
armyRules.fullDesc: Each set of Linked Gauss Flayers may only fire out one side each as if they were Hull Mounted on a Vehicle.

profiles.rules: Assault 1, Destroyer, Monsterbane, One Use Only

commonWargear.name: 2 Linked Synaptic Obliterators and Transdimensional Projectors

profiles.rules: 6" Aura, target unit with Hardwired for Destruction gains S+1, A+1. Roll a d6. On a 1, one model with this rule is removed from the game. It cannot reanimate or return in any form.
6" Aura, this model and target unit gain a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
4+ Invulnerability Save. Explodes on a 4+: S6 AP1+ in a d6" Radius.
5+ Invulnerability Save. This model explodes on a 4+.
6" Aura, this model and target unit gain a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
Each of your Command Phases roll d6. On a 5+, Heal one additional Wound. This ignores the normal Heal rules.
12" True Aura, Auto Hit, Monsterbane. Only used during your Shooting Phase against all Flying and High Altitude models in range except this model. Does not work if this model is reduced to M0.
6" Aura, target non-Titanic model in a Challenge with this model suffers -1 To Hit.
6" Aura, this model and one unit within 6" may roll Reanimation twice in your Command Phase. One Use Only.

mindshackle-scarabs-upgrade.label: Mindshackle Scarabs
mindshackle-scarabs-upgrade.note: 6" Aura, target non-Titanic model in a Challenge with this model suffers -1 To Hit.

resurrection-orb-upgrade.label: Resurrection Orb
resurrection-orb-upgrade.note: 6" Aura, this model and one unit within 6" may roll Reanimation twice in your Command Phase. One Use Only.

countertemporal-nanomines.label: Countertemporal Nanomines
countertemporal-nanomines.note: 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

cryptogeometric-adjuster.label: Cryptogeometric Adjuster
cryptogeometric-adjuster.note: 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

dimensional-sanctum.label: Dimensional Sanctum
dimensional-sanctum.note: This model and its unit gain Deepstrike.

hyper-material-ablator.label: Hyper Material Ablator
hyper-material-ablator.note: 6" Aura, target unit gains a 5+ Cover Save.

photon-transubjector.label: Photon Transubjector
photon-transubjector.note: This model ignores the First Wound Suffered per Phase.

prismatic-obfuscatron.label: Prismatic Obfuscatron
prismatic-obfuscatron.note: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may only be targeted if they are the closest unit to the attacker.

gloom-prison.label: Gloom Prison
gloom-prison.note: 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to Reanimation Rolls. Maximum 4+.

canoptek-plasmacyte-upgrade.label: Canoptek Plasmacyte
canoptek-plasmacyte-upgrade.note: 6" Aura, target unit with Hardwired for Destruction gains S+1, A+1. On a 1, one model is removed from the game.

inlineRules.name: My Will Be Done
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Relentless March
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.

inlineRules.name: Improved Living Metal
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model Heals +1 Wound in your Command Phase. This overrides the base Living Metal Rule.

inlineRules.name: My Will Be Done
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

inlineRules.name: United in Destruction
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Wound.

inlineRules.name: Relentless March
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.

inlineRules.name: My Will Be Done
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Lord of the Pryhian Legions
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target Immortal, Lychguard, or Pariah unit gains A+1.

inlineRules.name: Mind in the Machine
inlineRules.fullDesc: In the shooting phase, target a non-Titanic Vehicle model within 24" and shoot one weapon of your choice. You are allowed to target models friendly to the Vehicle, but not itself.

inlineRules.name: Mechanical Augmentation
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gains 1 randomized result. The same unit may benefit from this ability multiple times, but each result may only apply to the same target unit once each. Duplicate results have no effect. D3: 1 S+1, 2 A+1, 3 BS-1 (Improves by 1).

inlineRules.name: Lord of Technology
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to Reanimation Rolls. This can never become better than a +1, but rerolls may still apply.

inlineRules.name: Relentless March
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.

inlineRules.name: My Will Be Done
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Counter Tactics
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain all of the Special Rules from target unit within 24", excluding Wargear.

inlineRules.name: Adaptive Strategy
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and friendly target unit may swap Rapid Fire # for Assault #.

inlineRules.name: Prescient Strike
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit have I10.

inlineRules.name: The Stars are Right
inlineRules.fullDesc: In each of your Command Phases, roll a die. If the result is equal to or less than the current turn number, Orikan uses the Stars are Right Stat Line (M8, WS2+, BS5+, S7, T7, W5, I2, A4, Ld10, Sv3+) instead of the normal Stat Line. Orikan fully heals when he transforms.

inlineRules.name: My Will Be Done
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Relentless March
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.

inlineRules.name: Translocation Shroud
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and its unit, at the end of any of your Movement Phases, may go into Reserve and immediately Deepstrike. This cannot take place if this model or its unit is Locked in Melee. This special Deepstrike does not grant the usual 4+ Cover Save.

options.label: Translocation Shroud (+20 pts)
options.note: This model and its unit may Deepstrike at the end of any Movement Phase.

inlineRules.name: Relentless March
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.

inlineRules.name: My Will Be Done
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Surrogate Hosts
inlineRules.fullDesc: When this model is destroyed, on a 2+ swap it with a friendly Infantry model within 6" instead, with d3 Wounds restored. This replaces Reanimation.

inlineRules.name: Psionic Shockwave
inlineRules.fullDesc: All Characters and Independent Characters slain by this model explode in a S4 AP- in a 6" Radius. This does not affect friendly models.

inlineRules.name: Harbringer of Destruction
inlineRules.fullDesc: Vehicles Glanced by this model suffer a Penetration instead.

inlineRules.name: Living Lightning
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each time this model suffers a Wound after Saves and Feel No Pains in melee, inflict 1 Mortal Wound on the unit that inflicted it.

inlineRules.name: Harbringer of Doom
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit suffers Ld-1.

inlineRules.name: Psychokinesis
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may Deny the Witch as if it were Psychic Mastery Level 2.

inlineRules.name: Nanoscarabs
inlineRules.fullDesc: Repair 1 Wound on target unit within 3". On a 5+, repair one Disabled Weapon, Crew Stun, Immobilize, or Weapon Destroyed result.

options.label: Canoptek Control Node (+20 pts)
options.note: 6" Aura, target Canoptek Unit gains +1 To Hit.

inlineRules.name: Vanquish the Living
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Wound.

inlineRules.name: Cleaving Counterblow
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each Melee attack made against Obyron in a Challenge that misses grants Obyron one additional attack at Initiative Step Slow.

inlineRules.name: Ghostwalk Mantle
inlineRules.fullDesc: At the end of your Movement Phase you may remove Vargard Obyron and the unit he is joined to and Deepstrike them back onto the Table. If Deepstriking within 12" of Nemesor Zahndrekh do not scatter. One Use Only.

inlineRules.name: Flayer Virus
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura, all units suffer Ld-1. Necron units suffer Ld-2 instead. Flayed Ones are Immune to this Aura.

choices.label: Hyperphase Sword and Dispersion Shield (+8 pts per model)

inlineRules.name: Monster Escort
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may join Monster or Monstrous Infantry units as if it were an Independent Character.

inlineRules.name: Reanimation Beam
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target Infantry or Monstrous Infantry unit gains 5+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Repair Drones
inlineRules.fullDesc: Repair 1 Wound on target unit within 3". On a 5+, repair one Disabled Weapon, Crew Stun, Immobilize, or Weapon Destroyed result.

inlineRules.name: Fabricator Array
inlineRules.fullDesc: Repair d3 Wounds to target Vehicle within 3".

inlineRules.name: Scarab Hive
inlineRules.fullDesc: In your Command Phase, you may add one Scarab Swarm to an existing Scarab unit within 6". This may not exceed the maximum size of the unit. The same unit may not benefit from this more than once per Turn.

inlineRules.name: Never Stop Firing
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may fire into Melee. All misses automatically hit friendly units involved in the Melee, selected at random if there is more than one.

options.label: Any model: swap Hyperphase Threshers for

inlineRules.name: Targeting Relay
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this unit and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.

options.label: Any model: swap Particle Shredder for
Nebuloscope (+2 pts/model)
options.note: Ranged attacks from this model inflict a -1 Cover Save.

inlineRules.name: Agents of the Silent King
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model does not suffer the Autowounds from losing Combat Resolution as a Fearless model. If a friendly Necron unit within 6" fails Combat Resolution and does not pass their Ld Test, instead of suffering Autowounds remove one model from the game (no Reanimation) and the unit is considered to have passed the test. Canoptek units are immune to this rule.

inlineRules.name: Clog the Barrels
inlineRules.fullDesc: Any enemy non-Titanic Monster, Vehicle, or Monstrous Infantry may not fire weapons at any other target except this one while they are engaged in Melee to it. Flame weapons ignore this.

inlineRules.name: Wrath Form
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

inlineRules.name: Phase Generator
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model ignores Terrain and models when moving. It may not end its movement in a place it cannot occupy or end up in Melee unless it did so by Charging successfully.

inlineRules.name: Writhing Bodies
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model is considered to be equipped with Grenades for the purposes of Charging units in Cover.

options.label: Any model: swap Hyperphase Threshers for
Any model: swap Gauss Destructor for
Any model: swap Tesla Carbine for
Any model: swap Focused Death Ray for

inlineRules.name: Invasion Beam
inlineRules.fullDesc: Teleporter. This model has a Transport Capacity of 20, but instead of carrying the models it keeps them in Reserve. Any model with a Teleporter rule may bring up to its Transport capacity to the field each Turn. The Invasion Beam may Deepstrike the models anywhere along the flight path it moved this turn without Scattering. Each model deployed this way must take a Dangerous Terrain test.

inlineRules.name: Dread
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura, target unit must make a Fear Test.

inlineRules.name: Grand Illusion
inlineRules.fullDesc: After Deployment, but before Infiltrators are placed, redeploy d3 of your units.

inlineRules.name: Death
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each time this model is nominated to fight in Melee, it inflicts an Autowound with AP2+ on each model in base contact, friend or foe.

inlineRules.name: Gaze of Death
inlineRules.fullDesc: In the Shooting Phase, you may target a unit within 12". The unit takes a Ld test on 3d6, dropping the lowest die. For each point the Ld test failed by, the unit suffers an Autowound with AP2+. This overrides the normal AP- of Autowounds. If this does any Wounds to the target, the Nightbringer Heals 1 Wound as an exception to the normal Heal rules.

units.name: C'Tan Shard of the Void Dragon

inlineRules.name: Matter Absorption
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each time a Vehicle or Titanic Vehicle is destroyed within 18" of this unit roll a d6. On a 2+, heal 1 Wound. This is an exception to the normal Heal rules.

models.name: C'Tan Shard of the Void Dragon

options.label: Power Slot 1: Sky of Falling Stars
Power Slot 2: Sky of Falling Stars

inlineRules.name: Doomsday Weapon
inlineRules.fullDesc: This weapon cannot be Disabled.

inlineRules.name: Phase Shift Generator
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain 5+ Invulnerability Save.

choices.label: 2 Linked Synaptic Obliterators and Transdimensional Projectors

inlineRules.name: Massive Battery Unit
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model explodes on a 4+ when destroyed. If this model does not use its Grav Pulse this Shooting Phase (still triggers if eligible models enter the True Aura), you may fire each Tesla Sphere twice this Shooting Phase.

options.label: Power Slot 1: Charged Sky of Falling Star
Power Slot 2: Charged Sky of Falling Star

inlineRules.name: Monolith Vault
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may carry up to 3 Monoliths as a Transport. They may deploy up to 12" away.

inlineRules.name: Gates of the Tomb World
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may use the Eternity Portal up to two more times each turn by using its Access Points on each side.

options.label: Swap any set of 4 Gauss Arc Fluxes for

inlineRules.name: Translocation Protocols
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit does not Scatter when Deepstriking.

inlineRules.name: Relentless March
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.

inlineRules.name: Ziggurat Dock
inlineRules.fullDesc: A Monolith may Dock to the top of the Tomb Ziggurat. Particle Whips that are docked gain S+1, but the Monolith may no longer use its Eternity Gate.

inlineRules.name: Resurrection Amplifier
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to Reanimation Rolls. This can never be improved by more than +1.
